feedback.text: I have grown up with video games, and for me it is a very important part of my life, and of many others' lives. It can for some be simple, short-lived joy, but for many others as myself, it is art, and community. I hope that video games can be included in the digital fairness act, so they can be protected. I am a big fan of the stop killing games initiative, and hope that the politicians in the EU can take on this movements' philosophy. Live long and prosper.
